generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a veteran, I've seen firsthand how our alliances work - or don't. The truth is, our partners aren't pulling their weight. We're stretched thin protecting others while they cut defense budgets. Remember when Germany delayed their NATO spending? That's not partnership. We need to focus on securing OUR borders and interests first. Our security comes first, and we can't afford to be the world's policeman anymore. #AmericaFirst #NationalSecurity
